name: io.github.cruxible-ai/cruxible-core
description: Hard state for AI agents: typed, governed, durable state with deterministic queries, governed writes, and receipts.

environmentVariables.description: Permission mode: admin (default), graph_write, or read_only
environmentVariables.name: CRUXIBLE_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated absolute paths restricting which directories cruxible_init can access
environmentVariables.name: CRUXIBLE_ALLOWED_ROOTS
